mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon c JOIN coupon_brand cb ON cb.coupon_id = c.id JOIN coupon_category cc ON cc.coupon_id = c.id JOIN brand b ON b.id = cb.brand_id JOIN product p ON p.brand_id = b.id WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.id = #{productId} ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(c.created_at, '%Y%m%d') DESC
